title: Perfectly Crisp Spanish Andouille Paella
description: A citrusy and crisp Spanish dish featuring Andouille sausage, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this paella is satvik-friendly and baked to perfection with a salt crust.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced Andouille sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, lemon juice, and browned sausage, and bring to a boil.
Cover the skillet with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the rice is crispy and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
